hero.sub: A Claude Code skill orchestrating vibe discovery, custom icons, 2D illustrations, optional shader effects, and vibe-scaled motion — built to enforce cohesion, not generate slop.

install.label: — Install
install.h2: One command. No build step. No config.
install.caption1: Auto-discovered. Drops a SKILL.md into ~/.claude/skills/nelson-ui/. Activates on phrases like "design a landing page", "build my portfolio", "redesign this site", or any page-type trigger. No registration step, no slash-command. Skill name lives in frontmatter.
install.caption2: Works with the open npx skills ecosystem — Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Cursor, and 40+ AI agents.
install.side_desc: For motion intensity 3/3 or briefs mentioning ScrollTrigger / scroll choreography, nelson-ui auto-detects and invokes these. Optional — falls back to inline patterns if absent.

why.label: — Why
why.close: Cohesion is the multiplier on craft. This skill encodes that as enforceable rules.

scope.label: — Scope
scope.close: Universal toolkit applies to both — vibe lock, palette, typography, custom icons, 2D illustrations, visual effects, motion intensity. Companion approaches suggested in § Beyond.

pipeline.label: — Pipeline
pipeline.h2: Eight phases, each with a single concern.
pipeline.p00_desc: New build vs redesign. URL or screenshot triggers redesign audit.
pipeline.p00a_desc: --study <URL>. URL safety refusal → fetch → DNA extraction (fonts + OKLCH palette + macrostructure) → 3-way branch.
pipeline.p005_desc: Any --type accepted. Routes to special tier (landing / portfolio) or generic tier. No refusals.
pipeline.p005b_desc: Multi-signal detect: brief ≤30 words + UI keyword + --component flag. Emits component + .preview.* 8-state wrapper.
pipeline.p01_desc: Inline brainstorm. Brief branches per type. Locks vibe + audience + conversion goal.
pipeline.p02_desc: Lock palette, typography pair, spatial language, effect layer, motion intensity. Commitment audit ≥48/60.
pipeline.p03_desc: Direct SVG or AI-generated + traced. Single stroke weight, single fill style, fresh metaphors.
pipeline.p04_desc: Pick illustration style from 11×11 catalog. Cohesion across all assets. Static 3D renders as PNG.
pipeline.p05_desc: Optional. Shaders, particles, atmospheric. CSS-first; WebGL only when CSS can't. NO 3D models.
pipeline.p06_desc: Inline plan protocol. Type-aware: landing sections vs portfolio sections + case study route vs generic page-purpose-driven.
pipeline.p07_desc: Pre-emit <design_plan> verification gates code emission. Apply locked motion intensity. Custom icons only.
pipeline.p08_desc: Inline tier-filtered audit. Tier 1 hits = block ship. Grep + visual checks. Marketing-only rules skipped for non-marketing types.

vibes_sec.label: — Vibes
vibes_sec.h2: Eleven anchors. One + one wildcard. Locked at design time.

theme.footer_desc: Each theme = one vibe anchor from visual-direction-guide.md — palette + typography + motion ease + custom P-logo. DOM structure stays Editorial; example pages remain Editorial-only.

tiers.label: — Anti-slop
tiers.t3_footnote: Allowed only IF visual craft cohesion ≥ 8/10. Override path: user requests twice + reason logged.
tiers.t1_item_2: Purple/blue gradient hero with gradient text
tiers.t2_item_1: Generic browser-mockup right-half of split hero
tiers.t2_item_5: Centered hero + centered H1 at high variance
tiers.t2_item_8: Generic fade-up motion on every element
tiers.t3_item_1: Inter body when paired with distinctive display
tiers.t3_item_2: AI cliché phrases in non-load-bearing copy

examples_sec.label: — In practice
examples_sec.coffee_quote: "Design a landing page for a new specialty coffee subscription service targeting home-brewing enthusiasts in Japan. Vibe should feel editorial and warm."
examples_sec.coffee_outcome: Editorial coffee landing with custom assets, vibe-paired type, zero AI slop. No 3D, no icon library, no purple gradient anywhere.
examples_sec.portfolio_quote: "Redesign this portfolio: example.com — I want it to feel more elegant and let my work speak. Currently has too many flashy hover effects."
examples_sec.portfolio_outcome: Restrained portfolio that lets the work breathe. Atmospheric, not flashy. Audit-caught copy leftover prevented a slop-shipped redesign.
examples_sec.blog_quote: "Design a blog landing for a typography studio's writing. Editorial vibe, long-form serif."
examples_sec.blog_outcome: Editorial blog landing with the same craft discipline as a landing page. Section stack picked from generic anatomy, not templated.
examples_sec.dashboard_quote: "Design a dashboard for a self-hosted analytics tool. Brutalist vibe, dense info, dark mode."
examples_sec.dashboard_disclosure: Evidence-base disclosure (logged at Phase 0.5): skill's evidence base (12 marketing landings analyzed) does NOT cover dashboard / admin / e-commerce / app-surface patterns directly. Universal craft toolkit still applies. Output quality is best-effort.
examples_sec.dashboard_outcome: Dashboard with vibe lock, custom icons, motion discipline — without false-positive audit warnings about marketing patterns that don't apply.

showcase.label: — Showcase
showcase.intro: Each card opens a real example file demonstrating one vibe × type × macrostructure combination. WebP previews are 16-30 KB each (auto-captured at 1440×900, optimized).

coffee.title: Coffee subscription
coffee.desc: Tsumiki — specialty single-origin coffee, weekly letter from the roaster.

luxury.title: Heritage perfumery
luxury.desc: Maison Lumière — single bottle, twelve years of attar, hand-blended in Grasse.

playful.title: Illustration duo
playful.desc: Mochi Studio — illustration + motion duo in Lisbon, six selected projects in Bento Grid.

mandates.label: — Mandates
mandates.intro: Mandates are doctrine — what the skill MUST and MUST NOT do. Anti-slop tiers above are audit patterns the skill greps for. Mandates are the why behind tier-1 patterns.
mandates.m1_desc: Not in copy, headings, or as icons. Use a custom SVG instead.
mandates.m2_desc: Lucide, Heroicons, Phosphor, Tabler, Font Awesome, Material, react-icons — all forbidden.
mandates.m3_desc: Inter alone, purple/blue gradient hero, two equal CTAs, "Elevate / Seamless" copy, fabricated metrics, meta-label headers, hero filler text.
mandates.m4_desc: Static render → PNG OK. Real-time GLB forbidden (user-product GLB needs logged override).
mandates.m5_desc: Phase 5 = shaders, particles, atmosphere. CSS first; WebGL only when CSS can't.
mandates.m6_desc: Every site gets the proposal. User accepts or declines. Default = decline.
mandates.m7_desc: Never write code or generate assets before vibe + palette + typography are locked.
mandates.m8_desc: Landing / portfolio get rich anatomy. All other types use generic anatomy + skeleton. Phase 8 audit filters per --type.
mandates.m9_desc: Macrostructure must differ from last 3 entries in .nelson-ui/log.json. Vibe / dials should differ from last entry.
mandates.m10_desc: Phase 7 entry gates code behind a 10-field <design_plan> block. Any FAIL routes back. Stamped in CSS + plan.md.

faq.label: — FAQ
faq.a1: As body text only, IF paired with a distinctive display font (Instrument Serif, PP Neue Montreal, Migra, etc.). Inter alone = AI fingerprint (Tier 3 — compensable but discouraged).
faq.a2: Yes. The skill ships as SKILL.md via the open npx skills ecosystem (vercel-labs/skills) — installs into Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Cursor, and 40+ agents. Same file, same behavior.
faq.a3: A named page-shape archetype, independent of vibe. Seven exist: Marquee Hero, Bento Grid, Long Document, Manifesto, Stat-Led, Workbench, Letter. Vibe locks the surface; macrostructure locks the shape. Diversification rule: macrostructure pick must differ from the last 3 entries in .nelson-ui/log.json.
faq.q4: Can I add a rotating 3D product GLB to my hero?
faq.a4:
Generally no. Direct evidence from 12 real landings showed 0/7 human-crafted pages used real-time 3D models. Use one of these instead:

1. Static 3D render → 2D image (recommended) — render in Blender / Spline / KeyShot, export PNG/WebP.

2. 2D illustration matching vibe — from the 11×11 catalog.

3. Shader effect for atmosphere — CSS first, WebGL only when CSS can't.

User-provided real-product GLB allowed with double-confirm + logged override.
faq.a5: At Phase 7 entry, nelson-ui detects motion intensity 3/3 OR brief keywords (GSAP, ScrollTrigger, scroll choreography, scrub, pin section). If the gsap-* skills are installed at ~/.claude/skills/gsap-*, it invokes them via active Skill calls. If missing, it suggests npx skills add greensock/gsap-skills once, then falls back to inline patterns — non-blocking. See references/gsap-integration.md.
faq.a6: Runs URL safety refusal first (7 patterns blocked: themeforest, framer-templates, dribbble shots, behance galleries, gumroad UI-kits, webflow-templates, generic marketplaces). If safe, fetches the page as untrusted data, extracts DNA (fonts + OKLCH palette + macrostructure + nav/footer archetypes), emits a diagnosis report. You pick a 3-way branch: build with this DNA / lock DNA to design.md / stop. Diversification rule suspended when build-with-DNA chosen.
faq.a7: Multi-signal detect — nelson-ui counts: brief ≤30 words + UI element keyword (button / card / modal / dropdown / nav / form / etc.) + --component flag + single-file target + "just the X" phrasing. 2+ signals → component scope confirmed. 1 signal → skill asks "one component or whole page?". Component scope skips macrostructure / hero / nav-footer / Phase 8 visual / log.json and outputs the component + .preview.* 8-state wrapper.
faq.q8: How do I add a new vibe like vaporwave?
faq.a8: Add palette + typography pair to references/visual-direction-guide.md, add an archetype mapping to assets/nextjs-skeleton/section-archetypes.md, add an illustration-style row to references/2d-illustration-catalog.md, add a 3D-pairing row to visual-direction-guide if relevant. Then run validate.

beyond.label: — Beyond
beyond.intro: Skill no longer refuses any page type. For these specific deeper-architecture cases, another workflow is genuinely a better fit — nelson-ui suggests, doesn't force-redirect. The visible page surface stays in scope regardless.

footer.credit: Designed with nelson-ui · editorial vibe · cream + ink + dusk-rose · Instrument Serif + Geist · motion personality: premium
